title: families.slug has a redundant secondary index
reasoning: The unique constraint on slug already creates an index that can satisfy slug lookups. The additional non-unique index on the same column adds unnecessary storage and write-maintenance overhead for every family insert or slug update without improving query capability.
recommendation: Remove the redundant non-unique slug index. If this migration has already run in production, use a forward migration to drop the redundant families_slug_index while preserving the unique index.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: The feature declares no linked tests, and ordinary migration tests usually verify table creation rather than duplicate index metadata or write-amplification costs.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a schema assertion that the families table has the unique slug index but does not have a separate non-unique slug-only index.
minimumFixScope: Remove $table->index('slug') before release, or add a forward migration that drops families_slug_index after confirming families_slug_unique remains.
